commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
A very wise man. That is, a crafty and subtle man: for the counsel he gave on this occasion shows that his wisdom was but carnal and worldly. (Challoner)
Jonadab seems to be styled Jonathan, chap. xxi. 21. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: A very wise man: That is, a crafty and subtle man: for the counsel he gave on this occasion shews that his wisdom was but carnal and worldly.
